gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens, while a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system; additionally, tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps, and career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact; at the entrance, event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards, students clutch resumes inside branded folders, dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor, and alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station; furthermore, consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables, and healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps, while students clutch resumes inside branded folders, and alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station, and dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor; additionally, students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens, while event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards at the entrance, and career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact, and a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system; furthermore, consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables, and healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps, and at the entrance, event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards; additionally, students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens, while dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor, alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station, and career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact; consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables, and healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos; additionally, students clutch resumes inside branded folders, furthermore, a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps, and career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact; furthermore, a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system, and students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens, while event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards at the entrance, and dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor; additionally, students clutch resumes inside branded folders, and healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos, while consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables; alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables, and healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos; additionally, students clutch resumes inside branded folders, while tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps, and career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact; furthermore, a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system, and students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens, while event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards at the entrance, and dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor, and alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station, while dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor, and career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact; additionally, tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps, and at the entrance, event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards, and students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens, and students clutch resumes inside branded folders, and a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system, while consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables, and healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
